questions.question: 1.The solvent used in this experiment should be,?

answers.c: Non-volatile and volatile both are accepted
answers.d: in liquid form at room temperature

questions.question: 2)Consider solute A and solute B of identical molality in a given solvent. Solute A dissociates into two species in solvent, whereas solute B dissolves in the solvent as a single species. The freezing point depression of the solution of solute A will be -------- that of solute B

answers.d: less than by some unknown amount to

4)The key assumption used in the experiment to determine the molecular weight of the rhombic sulphur is

answers.a: Sulphur particles do not associte or dissociate into smaller particles in naphthalene
answers.b: Sulphur has a higher melting point than naphthalene
answers.c: Sulphur has a lower melting point than naphthalene
answers.d: Naphthalene is a solid at room temperature

questions.question: 5)The freezing Point is determined graphically from the temperature versus time graph by observing a

answers.b: region of positive slope in the graph
answers.c: region of negative slope in the graph
